name: @qeet-id/example-nextjs
description: Example Next.js app that logs users in with Qeet ID via @qeet-id/nextjs + @qeet-id/react.
_comment_no_nextjs_sdk: QID-06: @qeet-id/nextjs has no replacement anywhere after the 2026-07-10 SDK extraction (sdk/js/nextjs was deleted, no qeet-sdks/qeet-id-nextjs repo exists) — this example is excluded from the Bun workspace (pnpm-workspace.yaml no longer exists) until that package is resurrected. Do not silently drop this dependency's intent; the app's server-side session/middleware code still imports from @qeet-id/nextjs and will not build.
